sentences.english: I go to the library near my house every weekend.
sentences.korean: 매주 주말 집 근처 도서관에 가요.

sentences.english: It is a quiet and comfortable place to study.
I can borrow up to five books at a time.
sentences.korean: 한 번에 최대 5권까지 빌릴 수 있어요.

sentences.english: I have to return them within two weeks.
The library also has free Wi-Fi and a reading room with big windows.
sentences.korean: 도서관에는 무료 와이파이와 큰 창문이 있는 열람실도 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
